body.title: Convert Igor human-readable logs from .log/.txt to .md
body.result: forensic_logger writes narrative_turn.YYYYMMDD.md with # header; existing .log migrated to .md; 5 tests pass
body.description:
CC's session logs are .md files, Igor's are .log or .txt. Kate handles .md files consistently and can't parse the other formats. Convert Igor's human-readable output logs to .md so the same log-viewing tooling works for both agents.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/logging.py (or wherever Igor writes readable logs), TheIgorsProject/akien/Readings directory structure
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: identify Igor's readable log locations, convert format to .md, ensure header/body structure matches CC's pattern. Out of scope: changing where Igor writes logs, changing log content.
**Completion criteria:** (1) Igor's next session writes to .md file. (2) Kate can view it with the same tooling as CC logs. (3) Old .log/.txt files migrated or marked as archive.
